use_cases: Displaying version updates or new feature announcements in a SaaS application
Showing promotional messages or sales announcements in e-commerce storefronts
Communicating system status or maintenance windows to users
Delivering important notices or alerts that users can dismiss after reading
Prominently surfacing CTAs like documentation links within product interfaces
ai_summary: A dismissible announcement banner component with customizable title, description, and link text. Features a close button that removes the banner from view using React state management. Built with Tailwind CSS using muted background colors and hover effects on interactive link elements, making it suitable for inline placement in application layouts to surface important notifications or promotional content.
